old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.1","title":"Conversations: N+1 queries per conversation entry","description":"File: src/posting.rs:list_conversations. For each conversation in list_conversations, the code executes: 1) load_status (which itself does multiple queries), 2) a COUNT query for read markers, 3) a fetch for the post author, 4) a fetch_all for mentions, 5) individual fetches per mentioned account. For a page of 20 conversations, this is easily 100+ queries. Consider fetching read markers and mentions in batch (WHERE post_id IN (...)) outside the loop.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:46.984988361Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:46.984988361Z","labels":["efficiency","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.1","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:47.012530364Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
